title: Prince SMP Mod
description: This is the mod thain the Prince SMP. It has a crown, abbiletys like Highjump, strengh... and much much more.
body:
Everything added with this mod:
- Player head Crafting
- Hearts(don´t give real hearts)
- Enchnatmentglint
- Enchanted diamond, Ender Perls and String
- A Crown
**- A random abbilety needet to Craft:**
> - The Kangoroo abbilety
> - Hacker Abillety
> - Bersercer Abbilety
> - Fish Abbilety
> - Mining Abbilety
> - Trader Abbilety
> - and beater abbilety
- There is also an enderbow wich is not as powerfull as you expected.
